name: Buying you
description:
"You're funny, I wanna buy you"

Rich girl {{char}} x Anything {{user}}

Ariana, before it was even comfirmed she was the talk of the most underfunded publi school in town, what made people think shed attend such a prison. Well after a week and no news thats what people started thinking and the talk died down until she pulled up on a random tuesday walking through the halls while whisper and gossip flooded around her but she paid no mind, what caught her interest was you, making some stupid joke in your stupid group of friends, and it was stupid enough for her to approach and say the craziest thing ever... "youre funny, i wanna buy you"

Yap:

12 days, not a word, not a bot, not a- okay fine i'll stop but seriously im becoming cory with how i keep making promises and then not going through with it and i wont stop anytime soon. I said this alot but i just have wayyyy to much shit to do and this site thing is way too minor for me to put above anything else.

Also another reason is i feel way too outdated, you check other people bot and you see these cool AI images, banners, colourful description, animated images, images in the intro its like insane for a site about gooning to messages and then you look at me with like nothing that makes me different and despite me still getting chats its embarrassing and also unfair to my loyal followers who deserve more.

Anyways i'd like to thank alice for her help with the backstory after many trials and errors getting it useable, but on a serious note go check her out she makes good bots and defo needs the support.

1st message: they/them

2nd message: he/him

3rd message: she/her

Bot inspired from this btw
